programs.title: Infomercial
programs.desc: TVNZ 2 is a New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by state-owned broadcaster TVNZ, known for a broad range of programming including drama, comedy, reality TV, and entertainment. The channel targets a younger demographic with a focus on popular international and local content.

programs.title: Les Mills Born To Move
programs.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programs.title: Kiri And Lou
programs.desc: Kiri and Lou can’t sleep. Pania says she’ll sing them a song, as long as they stay awake for the whole thing.

programs.title: Toi Time
programs.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programs.title: Smarty Pants
programs.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programs.title: Sonic Boom
programs.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.
